description: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts is a global hotel franchising company and loyalty-program operator with hotel booking, rewards, and travel-related services. Its public web presence covers hotel brands, reservations, rewards, business travel, and AI-assistant hotel discovery.
summary: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts exposes two discovered MCP server endpoints under mcp.wyndhamhotels.com; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, or CLIs were found on the given domain.
